sql_array: CREATE TABLE fuzz_test (id UInt32, value String, num UInt8 DEFAULT toUInt8OrZero(value));
SELECT id, toUInt8OrZero(value) AS converted_value, id -> converted_value AS lambda_test FROM fuzz_test;
SELECT id, (SELECT COUNT() FROM fuzz_test WHERE toUInt8OrZero(value) > 0) AS positive_count FROM fuzz_test GROUP BY id HAVING positive_count > 0;
SELECT id, toUInt8OrZero(num) AS converted_num FROM (SELECT id, value, toUInt8OrZero(value) AS num FROM fuzz_test) AS subquery WHERE num < 1;
SELECT id, (value -> toUInt8OrZero(value)) AS lambda_conversion FROM fuzz_test;
SELECT id, num, toUInt8OrZero(value) AS corrected_num FROM fuzz_test WHERE value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY corrected_num DESC;
CREATE TABLE test_join (test_id UInt32, ref_value String);
SELECT f.id, f.value, j.ref_value -> toUInt8OrZero(ref_value) AS ref_converted FROM fuzz_test AS f JOIN test_join AS j ON f.id = j.test_id;
